channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Gaurav Gogoi questions election security and dismisses Assam exit polls amid BJP majority projections
item.description: Assam Congress president Gaurav Gogoi has raised serious allegations regarding election security in the state, claiming that workers of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) were seen inside strong rooms i...

item.title: Young driver killed after vehicle crashes into tree in Scarborough, Toronto police say
item.description: A man in his 20s has died following a single-vehicle crash in Scarborough, according to Toronto police. The collision happened on Friday evening, May 1, 2026, when the driver reportedly lost control o...

item.title: Workers highlight wage stagnation, job insecurity and rising living costs on Workers’ Day
item.description: What is typically a day of celebration for workers has increasingly become a platform for raising serious concerns about economic pressures in South Africa. Trade unions and labour organisations used ...

item.title: Photos capture major global events from Sara Duterte impeachment vote to OpenAI lawsuit and international crises
item.description: Rappler’s weekly photo roundup highlights major developments from the Philippines and around the world between April 25 and May 1, 2026 through powerful images tied to politics, conflict, culture, and...

item.title: Two Fishermen Die in Lake Victoria Collision as Abducted Infant is Found Alive in Mwanza
item.description: In Mwanza Region, two fishermen have lost their lives following a tragic collision between a cargo vessel and a small fishing boat on Lake Victoria. The incident happened on April 17 at around 2:00 am...

item.title: US approves $8.6bn emergency arms sales to Middle East allies without congressional review
item.description: The United States administration under President Donald Trump has approved military sales worth more than $8.6 billion to key Middle Eastern allies, including Israel, Qatar, Kuwait, and the United Ara...

item.title: AFP to monitor and support Atin Ito civilian mission delivering supplies to Pag-asa Island
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — The Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) announced that it will help ensure the safe passage of a civilian-led mission travelling to Pag-asa Island in the West Philippine Sea. T...

item.title: Timeline of events in Alice Springs child abduction and murder case involving suspect previously seen by police
item.description: The article details the tragic abduction and murder of a five-year-old girl, referred to as Kumanjayi Little Baby, in Alice Springs, Australia. According to reports, police had interacted with the mai...

item.title: Brumbies aim to revive Super Rugby Pacific campaign against Reds in Brisbane
item.description: The article previews a crucial Super Rugby Pacific clash between the ACT Brumbies and the Queensland Reds in Brisbane, with the Brumbies under pressure to turn their season around after a disappointin...

item.title: Former Australian politicians take advisory roles in arms company amid ongoing lobbying concerns
item.description: The article examines the close and ongoing connections between former Australian politicians and the defence industry, focusing on weapons manufacturer NIOA. It highlights what is often described as a...

item.title: PMD warns of glacial flood risks in northern Pakistan amid incoming westerly weather system
item.description: The Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD) has issued an important alert regarding the risk of Glacial Lake Outburst Floods (GLOFs) in the northern regions, particularly Gilgit-Baltistan and Khyber ...

item.title: Russia launches large-scale drone attacks across Ukraine as Kyiv strikes oil infrastructure in Tuapse
item.description: Russia launched more than 400 drones at Ukraine in a large daytime assault on Friday, with Ukrainian officials saying 388 were intercepted or neutralised. The attacks targeted multiple regions across ...

item.title: PDP insists leadership remains intact after Supreme Court ruling on Ibadan convention
item.description: The Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) don come out strongly to reject reports wey say the party dey face leadership vacuum after the recent Supreme Court judgement. Speaking for Abuja during one press co...

item.title: Vice Ganda urges Leni Robredo to reconsider a 2028 presidential run during Naga tourism event
item.description: During a Labor Day event in Naga City on May 1, comedian and television host Vice Ganda publicly urged Mayor Leni Robredo to reconsider her decision not to run for president in the 2028 elections. Vic...

item.title: Nairobi Expressway temporarily waives tolls on key exits to ease flooding-related congestion
item.description: Motorists using the Nairobi Expressway from Mlolongo towards the city centre have been given temporary relief after the operator, MOJA Expressway Company, announced a toll waiver on selected exits. Th...

item.title: APC Faces Internal Disputes Across States Over Consensus Candidate Selection Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: Fresh crisis dey brew inside the ruling APC as the party’s plan to use consensus arrangement to pick candidates for the 2027 general elections dey face strong resistance for many states. Under the Ele...

item.title: Phil Vassar reflects on his 30-year country music career and lasting connection with fans
item.description: This CTV News Winnipeg article profiles American country music artist Phil Vassar as he reflects on a career spanning roughly three decades in the music industry. Based on the information provided, th...

item.title: Home Affairs suspends officials after fake AI-generated references found in immigration policy
item.description: South Africa’s Department of Home Affairs has suspended two senior officials after it emerged that a major immigration policy document contained a large number of fabricated references, likely generat...

item.title: Latin American migrants deported from the U.S. face uncertainty and confinement in Congo
item.description: A group of Latin American migrants who sought asylum in the United States found themselves unexpectedly deported to the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), where they remain stranded under restric...

item.title: Nikola Jokic acknowledges Denver’s struggles after playoff exit, reiterates commitment to Nuggets
item.description: Nikola Jokic expressed both disappointment in the Denver Nuggets’ early playoff exit and a strong desire to remain with the franchise long term following their Game 6 loss to the Minnesota Timberwolve...
